## Goal

Set up the repository structure and store the verified requirements documents in `/docs`.

## Source IDs

Documentation setup for:
- Business Rules
- Functional Requirements
- User Stories

## Description

Create a clean repository structure for the Manga Creation Workflow and Publishing Management System. The three requirement documents should be stored in `/docs` so the team can trace implementation issues back to business rules, functional requirements, and user stories.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `/docs/business-rules.md` exists.
- [ ] `/docs/functional-requirements.md` exists.
- [ ] `/docs/user-stories.md` exists.
- [ ] README links to the requirement documents.
- [ ] Project board uses Source IDs for traceability.

## Out of Scope

- Application code implementation.
